title: ARCHCODE Real Clinical Atlas — HBB Locus

data_sources.variants: NCBI ClinVar (real, downloaded via E-utilities API)

pearl_variants.insight: PEARL: VEP blind (score=0.20) but ARCHCODE detects structural disruption (SSIM=0.949). Candidate for 3D-mediated pathogenicity.
